items: 110 days to enforcement. Full high-risk AI requirements activate 2 August 2026: risk management, data governance, documentation, human oversight, accuracy, robustness, cybersecurity.
Penalty structure confirmed: up to €35M or 7% global turnover for prohibited AI. €15M / 3% for high-risk non-compliance. €7.5M / 1.5% for incorrect information.
72-hour incident reporting: organisations must define response protocols with 72h/15-day reporting windows to authorities. Automated guardrails required at runtime.
High-risk scope includes AKT’s work: employment decisions (EX), biometrics, essential services. Advisory partners will need compliance evidence in RFPs.
